description: Fix code example in plugin-development.mdx that fails the scaffolded project's prettier config when copied verbatim.
qualityChecks: cd docs && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run knip && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Reformat getItems fetch() call in plugin-development.mdx to match scaffolded prettier config
userStories.description: As a plugin developer, I want code examples in the documentation to pass the scaffolded project's quality checks when copied verbatim so that I don't see unexpected lint/format errors.
acceptanceCriteria: The getItems tool code block in docs/content/docs/guides/plugin-development.mdx has its fetch() call formatted to fit within 120-character line width (the scaffolded project's printWidth setting)
The reformatted code block still renders correctly in the docs site (fenced code block preserved, no syntax errors)
cd docs && npm run build passes
cd docs && npm run type-check passes
cd docs && npm run lint passes
cd docs && npm run knip passes
cd docs && npm run format:check passes
